info.name: AstroShriyam — Admin Panel APIs
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for all Admin Panel APIs.

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}`  (default: `http://localhost:5000`)

**Auth:** After calling *Admin Login*, the test script auto-saves the JWT to `{{admin_token}}`. All protected routes use `Bearer {{admin_token}}` via collection-level auth.

**Folders:**
1. Auth
2. Dashboard
3. Admin Profile
4. Subadmin Management
5. User Management
6. Partner (Astrologer) Management
7. Banner Management
8. Product Management
9. Notification Management
10. Wallet / Transactions

item.name: 1. Auth

request.description:
Register a new super admin account.

This endpoint is **public** but protected by a `secretKey` that must match the `ADMIN_REGISTER_SECRET` environment variable on the server — preventing unauthorized admin creation.

**Body:**
- `mobile` (string, required) — unique mobile number
- `password` (string, required) — minimum 6 characters
- `secretKey` (string, required) — must match `ADMIN_REGISTER_SECRET` in `.env`
- `fullName` (string, optional)
- `email` (string, optional)

The test script auto-saves the returned `token` to `{{admin_token}}`.

originalRequest.description:
Register a new super admin account.

This endpoint is **public** but protected by a `secretKey` that must match the `ADMIN_REGISTER_SECRET` environment variable on the server — preventing unauthorized admin creation.

**Body:**

- `password` (string, required) — minimum 6 characters
- `secretKey` (string, required) — must match `ADMIN_REGISTER_SECRET` in `.env`
- `fullName` (string, optional)
- `email` (string, optional)

The test script auto-saves the returned `token` to `{{admin_token}}`.

request.description:
Authenticate as admin or subadmin using mobile number and password.

**Body:**
- `mobile` (string, required)
- `password` (string, required)

The test script auto-saves the returned `token` to the collection variable `{{admin_token}}`.

item.description: Public authentication endpoints — no token required.

item.name: 2. Dashboard

request.description:
Returns aggregate counts: total users, blocked users, partner approval breakdown, banners, products, notifications, transactions, and total wallet revenue.

**Auth:** Bearer token required.

originalRequest.description:
Returns aggregate counts: total users, blocked users, partner approval breakdown, banners, products, notifications, transactions, and total wallet revenue.

**Auth:** Bearer token required.

item.description: Overview statistics for the admin dashboard.

item.name: 3. Admin Profile

request.description: Fetch the currently authenticated admin's profile details (fullName, email, image, permissions).

originalRequest.description: Fetch the currently authenticated admin's profile details (fullName, email, image, permissions).

request.description:
Update the currently authenticated admin's profile.

**Body (multipart/form-data):**
- `fullName` (string, optional)
- `email` (string, optional)
- `image` (file, optional) — profile picture

Change the admin's account password.

**Body:**
- `currentPassword` (string, required) — existing password
- `newPassword` (string, required) — must be at least 6 characters

originalRequest.description:
Change the admin's account password.

**Body:**
- `currentPassword` (string, required) — existing password
- `newPassword` (string, required) — must be at least 6 characters

Change the admin's account password.

**Body:**
- `currentPassword` (string, required) — existing password
- `newPassword` (string, required) — must be at least 6 characters

item.description: View and update the logged-in admin's profile and change password.

item.name: 4. Subadmin Management

request.description:
List all subadmin accounts with their profile info.

**Note:** Only accessible by the super admin (role = `admin`).

Create a new subadmin account.

**Body:**
- `mobile` (string, required) — unique mobile number
- `password` (string, required)
- `fullName` (string, optional)
- `email` (string, optional)
- `permissions` (array, optional) — module access keys

originalRequest.description:
Create a new subadmin account.

**Body:**
- `mobile` (string, required) — unique mobile number
- `password` (string, required)
- `fullName` (string, optional)
- `email` (string, optional)
- `permissions` (array, optional) — module access keys

Create a new subadmin account.

**Body:**
- `mobile` (string, required) — unique mobile number
- `password` (string, required)
- `fullName` (string, optional)
- `email` (string, optional)
- `permissions` (array, optional) — module access keys

request.description:
Replace a subadmin's permissions array.

**Path Param:** `subadmin_id` — User `_id` of the subadmin

**Body:**
- `permissions` (array, required) — full list of module keys to assign

Permanently delete a subadmin account and their admin profile.

**Path Param:** `subadmin_id` — User `_id` of the subadmin

originalRequest.description:
Permanently delete a subadmin account and their admin profile.

**Path Param:** `subadmin_id` — User `_id` of the subadmin

item.description: Super admin only — create, list, delete, and update permissions for subadmin accounts.

item.name: 5. User Management

request.description:
List all users with pagination and optional filters.

**Query Params:**
- `status` — `active` | `blocked` | `inactive` | `pending`
- `search` — search by mobile number
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

Fetch a single user's full details including profile info and last 10 wallet transactions.

**Path Param:** `user_id` — User `_id`

Block, unblock, or change a user's account status.

**Body:**
- `status` (string, required) — `active` | `blocked` | `inactive` | `pending`

Permanently delete a user, their profile image (Cloudinary), and all wallet transactions.

**Note:** Cannot delete admin/subadmin accounts via this endpoint.

Manually credit or debit a user's wallet balance and record a transaction.

**Body:**
- `amount` (number, required) — positive number
- `type` (string, required) — `credit` | `debit`
- `title` (string, optional) — label (defaults to 'Admin Credit' / 'Admin Debit')

originalRequest.description:
Manually credit or debit a user's wallet balance and record a transaction.

**Body:**
- `amount` (number, required) — positive number
- `type` (string, required) — `credit` | `debit`
- `title` (string, optional) — label (defaults to 'Admin Credit' / 'Admin Debit')

Manually credit or debit a user's wallet balance and record a transaction.

**Body:**
- `amount` (number, required) — positive number
- `type` (string, required) — `credit` | `debit`
- `title` (string, optional) — label (defaults to 'Admin Credit' / 'Admin Debit')

item.description: View, filter, update status, delete users, and adjust their wallet balance.

item.name: 6. Partner (Astrologer) Management

request.description:
List all partner profiles with pagination.

**Query Params:**
- `approvalStatus` — `pending` | `approved` | `rejected`
- `search` — search by fullName or email
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

Fetch a single partner's full PartnerProfile including linked user account details.

**Path Param:** `partner_id` — PartnerProfile `_id`

Approve, reject, or reset a partner's application.

**Body:**
- `status` (string, required) — `approved` | `rejected` | `pending`

**Note:** Setting `approved` also activates the linked user account.

Block, activate, or deactivate a partner's user account.

**Body:**
- `status` (string, required) — `active` | `blocked` | `inactive`

Permanently delete a partner profile and all associated Cloudinary assets (profile image, government ID, certificate).

**Path Param:** `partner_id` — PartnerProfile `_id`

item.description: Manage astrologer/partner accounts — list, view, approve/reject, update status, and delete.

item.name: 7. Banner Management

request.description: Fetch all banners (both active and inactive), sorted by creation date (newest first).

Create a new banner. Image is uploaded to Cloudinary.

**Body (multipart/form-data):**
- `title` (string, required)
- `image` (file, required)
- `link` (string, optional)
- `isActive` (string, optional) — `true` | `false`

Update an existing banner. Only provided fields are updated.

**Path Param:** `banner_id` — Banner `_id`

Toggle the `isActive` field of a banner (no body required — flips the current state).

**Path Param:** `banner_id` — Banner `_id`

Delete a banner by ID.

**Path Param:** `banner_id` — Banner `_id`

item.description: Create, list, update, toggle active state, and delete promotional banners.

query.description: Filter by category. 'All' or omit to skip filter.

request.description: Fetch all products with optional category filter and pagination.
Fetch a single product by its ID.

formdata.value: A beautiful crystal bracelet for positive energy

request.description:
Create a new shop product.

**Body (multipart/form-data):**
- `name` (required)
- `price` (required)
- `description` (optional)
- `category` (optional — default `Other`)
- `image` (file, optional)
Update an existing product. Only the fields provided will be updated.

Permanently delete a product.

**Path Param:** `product_id` — Product `_id`

item.name: 9. Notification Management

request.description: List all notifications (system-wide and user-specific) with pagination, sorted newest first.

Send a system-wide notification to all users (userId = null).

**Body:**
- `title` (string, required)
- `body` (string, required)

response.name: 201 — Broadcast Sent

originalRequest.description:
Send a system-wide notification to all users (userId = null).

**Body:**
- `title` (string, required)
- `body` (string, required)

request.description:
Send a notification to a specific user.

**Body:**
- `userId` (string, required) — User `_id`
- `title` (string, required)
- `body` (string, required)

Delete a notification by ID.

**Path Param:** `notification_id` — Notification `_id`

item.description: Broadcast system-wide notifications, send to individual users, list all, and delete.

item.name: 10. Wallet / Transactions

query.description: Filter to a specific user's transactions (User _id)

request.description:
List all wallet transactions across all users.

**Query Params:**
- `type` — `credit` | `debit`
- `userId` — filter to a specific user's transactions
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

query.description: Filter to a specific user's transactions (User _id)

originalRequest.description:
List all wallet transactions across all users.

**Query Params:**
- `type` — `credit` | `debit`
- `userId` — filter to a specific user's transactions
- `page`, `limit` — pagination

item.description: View all wallet transactions across the platform.
